items.title_en: Intel's stock soars 15% as results top estimates, with chipmaker showing signs of growth
items.title_zh: 业绩超预期 英特尔股价大涨15% 芯片制造商显现增长迹象
items.desc_en: Intel has been a Wall Street darling of late even as the business has yet to find much momentum.
items.desc_zh: 英特尔最近一直是华尔街的宠儿，尽管该业务尚未找到太大动力。

items.title_en: Regeneron inks drug pricing deal with Trump, will offer new hearing-loss therapy for free
items.title_zh: 再生元与特朗普签署药品定价协议，将免费提供新的听力损失疗法
items.desc_en: Regeneron is the latest in a string of major drugmakers to make pricing concessions for new and existing medicines under agreements with Trump.
items.desc_zh: 再生元是一系列主要制药商中最新一家根据与特朗普达成的协议对新药和现有药物做出价格让步的公司。

items.title_en: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows
items.title_zh: Meta 表示，随着人工智能支出的增长，它将裁员 8,000 人
items.desc_en: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.
items.desc_zh: 此次裁员是员工数周以来一直期待的，这将是 Meta 自 2023 年以来最大规模的裁员。

items.title_en: Meta will cut 10% of workforce as company pushes deeper into AI
items.title_zh: 随着公司深入人工智能领域，Meta 将裁员 10%
items.desc_en: Meta plans to lay off 10% of its workforce, equaling about 8,000 employees, as the company continues to ramp up investments in artificial intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 随着公司继续加大对人工智能的投资，Meta 计划裁员 10%，相当于约 8,000 名员工。

items.title_en: Investor Bill Baruch buys Arm, citing pivot to AI chips and recent Meta deal as catalysts
items.title_zh: 投资者 Bil​​l Baruch 收购 Arm，称转向 AI 芯片和最近的 Meta 交易是催化剂
items.desc_en: Shares of Arm Holdings jumped last month after the company unveiled its first new in-house chip.
items.desc_zh: 上个月，在 Arm Holdings 推出首款新的内部芯片后，该公司股价大幅上涨。

items.title_en: Owning the stage: Look past Live Nation's legal troubles to see a growing, high-margin venue business
items.title_zh: 拥有舞台：回顾 Live Nation 的法律麻烦，看到不断增长的高利润场馆业务
items.desc_en: Live Nation's stock hasn't caught up to the possibility that the company, once freed from its legal overhang, can capture more fan dollars.
items.desc_zh: Live Nation 的股价还没有赶上该公司一旦摆脱法律困境就能获得更多粉丝收入的可能性。

items.title_zh: 路易斯安那州购物中心 10 人遭枪击； 2 人情况危急 - WAFB

items.title_en: Texas Instruments' stock jumps 18%, heads for best day since 2000 as AI demand soars
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求飙升，德州仪器 (TI) 股价上涨 18%，创 2000 年以来最佳单日表现
items.desc_en: Texas Instruments beat on earnings and revenue and gave upbeat guidance.
items.desc_zh: 德州仪器 (TI) 的盈利和营收表现良好，并给出了乐观的指引。

items.title_en: White House warns of 'industrial-scale' efforts in China to rip off U.S. AI tech
items.title_zh: 白宫警告中国将进行“工业规模”抄袭美国人工智能技术
items.desc_en: The U.S. government has previously accused China of targeting American AI technology and intellectual property.
items.desc_zh: 美国政府此前曾指责中国针对美国人工智能技术和知识产权。

items.title_en: Brent oil tops $104 per barrel on unconfirmed report Iran's top negotiator resigned
items.title_zh: 未经证实的报道伊朗最高谈判代表辞职，布伦特原油价格突破每桶 104 美元
items.desc_en: Oil prices are rising again as tensions escalate in the U.S.-Iran conflict.
items.desc_zh: 随着美伊冲突紧张局势升级，油价再次上涨。

items.title_en: OpenAI announces GPT-5.5, its latest artificial intelligence model
items.title_zh: OpenAI 发布最新人工智能模型 GPT-5.5
items.desc_en: The model is better at coding, using computers and pursuing deeper research capabilities, OpenAI says.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 表示，该模型更擅长编码、使用计算机和追求更深入的研究能力。

items.title_en: Spirit Airlines lawyer says cash 'not going to last for very much longer,' but government rescue on the table
items.title_zh: 精神航空律师表示，现金“不会持续太久”，但政府救援已摆在桌面上
items.desc_en: Spirit Airlines confirmed it is in talks with the Trump administration for a rescue package.
items.desc_zh: 精神航空证实正在与特朗普政府就救援方案进行谈判。

items.title_en: Software stocks plunge on ServiceNow, IBM results as AI fears escalate
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能担忧升级，ServiceNow 和 IBM 业绩导致软件股暴跌
items.desc_en: Shares of ServiceNow sank over 16%, dragging down other software names like Salesforce, Workday and Oracle with it.
items.desc_zh: ServiceNow 的股价下跌超过 16%，拖累了 Salesforce、Workday 和 Oracle 等其他软件公司的股价。

items.title_en: Huge chunk of glacier blocks Everest route in peak climbing season
items.title_zh: 攀登高峰季节，巨大的冰川阻挡了珠穆朗玛峰的路线
items.desc_en: Sherpas cannot prepare the route to the world's highest peak because a huge block of ice is in the way.
items.desc_zh: 夏尔巴人无法准备通往世界最高峰的路线，因为路上有一块巨大的冰块。

items.title_zh: 特朗普告诉BBC，金的访问“绝对”有助于修复与英国的关系
items.desc_en: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.
items.desc_zh: 在接受英国广播公司北美编辑的电话采访时，总统讨论了下周的访问以及他与英国首相的关系。

items.title_en: Microsoft plans first voluntary employee buyout in company's 51-year history
items.title_zh: 微软计划进行公司 51 年历史上的首次员工自愿买断
items.desc_en: Microsoft's inaugural voluntary buyouts will be open to workers at the senior director level and below whose years of employment and age add up to 70 or more.
items.desc_zh: 微软首次自愿买断将向高级主管级别及以下级别的员工开放，他们的工作年限和年龄合计达到 70 岁或以上。

items.title_en: South Africa's president suspends police chief after court charges
items.title_zh: 南非总统在法庭指控后暂停警察局长职务
items.desc_en: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.
items.desc_zh: 西里尔·拉马福萨表示，此次停职是因为房利美·马塞莫拉在打击犯罪方面发挥了关键作用。

items.title_en: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say
items.title_zh: 律师称，因社交媒体帖子而在科威特被关押的美国科威特记者被无罪释放
items.desc_en: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin reportedly faced charges, including spreading false information, after he re-posted images related to the Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，艾哈迈德·谢哈布-埃尔丁在转发与伊朗战争有关的图片后面临包括散布虚假信息在内的指控。

items.title_en: Warner Bros shareholders approve Paramount's $111bn takeover
items.title_zh: 华纳兄弟股东批准派拉蒙 1110 亿美元收购
items.desc_en: The approval came as Donald Trump is to attend a dinner with billionaire Paramount backers the Ellisons.
items.desc_zh: 这项批准是在唐纳德·特朗普将与亿万富翁派拉蒙公司的支持者埃里森家族共进晚宴之际获得批准的。

items.title_en: MrBeast's company sued by ex-employee over sexual harassment claim
items.title_zh: MrBeast 的公司因性骚扰被前雇员起诉
items.desc_en: Beast Industries has strongly denied claims of sexual harassment and workplace gender bias.
items.desc_zh: Beast Industries 强烈否认有关性骚扰和工作场所性别偏见的指控。

items.title_en: Trump administration reclassifies cannabis as less dangerous
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府将大麻重新归类为危险性较低的大麻
items.desc_en: Medical marijuana was moved into a lower category of drugs in order to increase research and access.
items.desc_zh: 为了增加研究和获取，医用大麻被归入较低类别的药物。

items.title_en: More than 500 people killed in Tanzania election violence, inquiry finds
items.title_zh: 调查发现坦桑尼亚选举暴力事件造成500多人死亡
items.desc_en: Opposition parties accused security forces but the official report does not say who was responsible.
items.desc_zh: 反对党指责安全部队，但官方报告没有说明谁应对此负责。

items.title_en: How the Iran war is hitting U.S. homebuilders
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何打击美国房屋建筑商
items.desc_en: A slew of building suppliers reported price hikes in April on everything from foam insulation and roofing to windows and doors.
items.desc_zh: 许多建筑供应商报告称，从泡沫隔热材料、屋顶到门窗，四月份所有产品的价格都上涨了。

items.title_en: UK Biobank health data listed for sale in China, government confirms
items.title_zh: 政府确认英国生物银行健康数据在中国出售
items.desc_en: The government said medical data of 500,000 people was affected but no personally identifiable information had been made available.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，50 万人的医疗数据受到影响，但尚未提供任何个人身份信息。

items.title_en: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
items.title_zh: 在德黑兰，资金短缺，日常生活中战争的重演迫在眉睫
items.desc_en: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.
items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的 Lyse Doucet 从伊朗报道，那里繁忙的购物街掩盖了该国未来的巨大不确定性。

items.desc_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数和纳斯达克综合指数周三下午上涨至新的收盘纪录。

items.title_zh: 这些图表显示伊朗经济如何自由落体
items.desc_en: Tehran's hardline rhetoric belies a brutal reality facing the regime and Iranian citizens: its economy, vulnerable even before the war, is now in tatters.
items.desc_zh: 德黑兰的强硬言论掩盖了该政权和伊朗公民面临的残酷现实：其经济在战前就已经脆弱不堪，而现在却已支离破碎。

items.title_en: Two trains collide head-on in Denmark, leaving four critically hurt
items.title_zh: 丹麦两列火车迎面相撞，四人重伤
items.desc_en: The accident happened early on Thursday at a level crossing north of Copenhagen.
items.desc_zh: 这起事故于周四早些时候发生在哥本哈根北部的一个平交道口。

items.title_en: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示，美国海军司令离职“立即生效”
